apps.name: Buddy
apps.tagline: A desktop companion pet for Claude.
apps.blurb: BLE + Wi-Fi companion: ASCII or GIF characters, approval prompts, jiggler, the full feature set. The reference composition.

apps.name: Glance
apps.blurb: Minimal second composition: no BLE, no faces — just Wi-Fi, the cloud hub, and one always-on status screen. Boots lighter (~200 KB free heap).
